title: Pirates !!!!!!!!!!!!
description: This modpack makes you feel like if you were in a big ocean as a pirate with op ships
body:
🏴‍☠️ Pirates

Version: 1.18.2+ | Forge/Fabric Compatible

Hoist the sails and chart your course for adventure! Pirates is a Minecraft modpack that transforms the world into a vast open sea filled with treasures, danger, and discovery. Explore tropical islands, battle rival ships, and uncover the secrets hidden beneath the waves.

⚓ Features

🌊 Expanded Oceans & Islands – Discover new biomes, mysterious archipelagos, and hidden coves.

⚔️ Weapons & Combat – Fight with cutlasses, pistols, and cannons as you raid ships or defend your loot.

🚢 Custom Ships & Sailing – Build and sail your own ships across massive oceans.

🏝️ Treasure & Exploration – Follow maps to buried chests, ancient ruins, and forgotten dungeons.

🧭 RPG & Adventure Elements – Gain gear, explore new dimensions, and uncover powerful artifacts.

🌅 Visual Immersion – Enhanced shaders and textures bring sunsets, storms, and oceans to life.

☠️ The sea is calling. Will you answer?

Set sail, find fortune, and carve your legend in Pirates — where every island hides a story and every wave hides danger.
